D-Low-Impression: This robot was slightly assertive and didn’t sound the most friendly
D-Mid-Impression: This robot still did not sound completely human like, but it was a little more friendly
D-High-Impression: This robot was rude and I would not trust it. Way too assertive
D-best(1H2L3M): This one sounded the friendliest and least robot sounding
D-worst(1H2L3M): This one sounded the most friendly. It did not make a bunch of direct commands, felt like it was giving suggestions
D-difference: One of them was very assertive and was basically barking commands. One of them was slightly less assertive but sounded a little robotic. The last one was very friendly and was giving more suggestions, but maybe it could be slightly more assertive
F-High-Impression: I think the robot had the correct level of confidence and assertiveness
F-Low-Impression: This robot was very friendly. I would trust it more because it is taking my input instead of giving me only commands
F-Mid-Impression: This robot was a little rude and was once again just giving commands
F-best(1H2L3M): This one gave the user a lot of input and made them feel like they were in control which is how it should be
F-worst(1H2L3M): This one was pushy and was barking commands at me
F-difference: One was very friendly and was giving me a lot of input, the other was pushy and barking commands at me
G-Mid-Impression: The robot did a good job at asking me if I needed a break and finding me a shortcut. It also did a great job identified a less crowded area for me to walk.
G-Low-Impression: This robot sounded slightly more friendly, but I couldn’t notice a large difference between this one and the previous one
G-High-Impression: This robot sounded less human like and I would not trust it as much
G-best(1H2L3M): It sounded the friendliest, the most human-like, and I would trust it the most
G-worst(1H2L3M): This would was the most friendly and the least assertive
G-difference: The second one is the most clear, friendly, and human like. The last one is the most robotic and sounds the least human like. The first one is a little too assertive
